process_state.note: 03:00 checkpoint blockers 8443/8753/14449 were gone at 04:00; ps and lsof were empty.

pdf_artifacts.note: 04:00 checkpoint used filesystem inventory only; no rebuild, decompose rerun, or DB-touching job was started. Prior authoritative continuity proof remained 127467 docs / 18765 pages / text+renders 1197 at 03:00.

decision.why: The previous raw DB writer/lock cleared by 04:00 and both manual daily_update runs show finished without current lock holders, but telegram Stage2 clean outputs still show no LinkEnriched/LinkEnrichment evidence. To avoid unsafely inferring a regression and starting a duplicate rebuild, the run kept the workspace quiescent and only recorded the post-completion state.

blocked.reason: The immediate duplicate-writer risk is gone, but telegram Stage2 clean outputs still lack direct enrichment evidence even after the raw DB sync advanced and the news_backfill/telegram_fast runs finished, so the remaining blocker is diagnosis: intentional public-fallback formatting omission versus unresolved link-content regression.
blocked.next_action: At the next checkpoint, inspect a small raw-to-clean sample and relevant Stage2 formatting/link-enrichment logic without starting any rebuild; only consider a single rebuild later if evidence shows the telegram clean omission is a true regression and no writer/lock has reappeared.
